title: Eric Shanower
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Eric Shanower''' is an artist who inked the later issues of the [[The Last Command (comics)|Last Command]] [[Star Wars comic books|comics]], as well as providing cover art for two of [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures]] series.

==Sources==
*[[The Last Command 4|''The Last Command'' 4]]
*[[The Last Command 5|''The Last Command'' 5]]
*[[The Last Command 6|''The Last Command'' 6]]
*[[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 3|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 3]]
*[[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 6|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 6]]

[[Category:Comic book inkers]]
